name: bug
description: 问题修复 / Something isn't working

name: documentation
description: 文档改进 / Improvements or additions to documentation

name: duplicate
description: 重复 / This issue or pull request already exists

name: enhancement
description: 新功能 / New feature or request

name: good first issue
description: 适合新人 / Good for newcomers

name: help wanted
description: 需要帮助 / Extra attention is needed

name: invalid
description: 无效 / This doesn't seem right

name: question
description: 待确认 / Further information is requested

name: wontfix
description: 不予处理 / This will not be worked on

name: design
description: 设计与视觉改进 / Design and visual improvements

name: performance
description: 性能优化 / Performance optimization

name: refactor
description: 代码重构 / Code refactoring

name: infra
description: 基础设施 / Infrastructure, CI/CD, deployment

name: good first vibe
description: AI 友好的任务 / AI-friendly task

name: size:XS
description: This PR changes 0-9 lines, ignoring generated files.

name: size:S
description: This PR changes 10-29 lines, ignoring generated files.

name: size:M
description: This PR changes 30-99 lines, ignoring generated files.

name: size:L
description: This PR changes 100-499 lines, ignoring generated files.

name: size:XL
description: This PR changes 500-999 lines, ignoring generated files.

name: size:XXL
description: This PR changes 1000+ lines, ignoring generated files.

name: lgtm
description: This PR has been approved by a maintainer
